subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, render thanks unto God that ye are the true dawn, luminous and effulgent, and a towering palm tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء حمد کنید خدا را که صبح صادقید روشن و پر انوار و نخل باسقید
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @praise and encouragement, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
